title: Weak Password Policy
description: Users may choose weak passwords, making it easier for attackers to gain unauthorized access through brute-force or dictionary attacks. The absence of enforced password complexity and regular password rotation significantly increases the risk.
attack_vector: Brute-force attacks, credential stuffing, dictionary attacks targeting the username/password authentication mechanism.
mitigations: Implement strong password policies (minimum length, complexity requirements, regular password rotation).
Enforce multi-factor authentication (MFA) for all users.
Implement account lockout policies after multiple failed login attempts.
